title: Broaden validation and CI integration
description: Partially completed. The current refactor added richer manifest/document validation and expanded VS Code extension tests around `.pinake` storage, legacy copy migration, Explorer settings merge, TreeView preview/edit behavior, and favorites. Remaining work: markdownlint, output formats, CLI or CI callable validator, and GitHub Actions workflow support.

checklist.text: Expand tests for .pinake storage, migration, settings merge, and TreeView preview/edit
Keep compile, lint, and VS Code extension tests passing after the refactor
Add markdownlint, CLI/CI validator output, and GitHub Actions workflow support
